subject: [PATCH v2 1/2] nilfs2: fix 64-bit division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Posted the original patch with a fix for the build failure on 32-bit ARM due to the change in inode->i_ino type.

2026-03-13.patch_summary: The patch fixes a build failure on 32-bit ARM caused by the change to use u64 for inode->i_ino, which requires using 64-bit division interfaces in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group(). The fix involves replacing the modulo operator with a call to div_u64_rem() and adjusting the calculation of the group index.
